title: 3 Bedroom Houses for Rent in Slavic Village
metaTitle: 3 Bedroom Houses for Rent in Slavic Village, Cleveland

primaryKeyword: 3 bedroom houses for rent Slavic Village cleveland
answerBox: Slavic Village, in Cleveland's ZIP 44105 on the southeast side, has a solid supply of 3-bedroom rental houses, typically priced from about $1,000 to $1,250 a month. Rent Finder Cleveland manages voucher-friendly homes in and around the neighborhood, including some 3-bedroom options — book a showing to see current availability.

sections.h2: 3-bedroom houses for rent in Slavic Village
body: Slavic Village sits on Cleveland's southeast side along the Morgana Run Trail, split between the Broadway-Slavic Village and North Broadway areas within **ZIP code 44105**. Three-bedroom homes are one of the more available sizes here, generally offering a basement and a small yard alongside the extra bedroom, and the neighborhood is one of the city's more affordable for renters needing that additional space.

Rent Finder Cleveland manages voucher-friendly rental homes in and around Slavic Village, and 3-bedroom homes are part of our regular mix in this neighborhood. [Book a showing](/p/book-showing) to see what's currently available, or [apply online](/apply) once you've found a listing that fits.

sections.h2: How much does a 3-bedroom house cost in Slavic Village?
body: Three-bedroom homes in the 44105 area commonly rent from about **$1,000 to $1,250** a month, depending on condition, size, and whether utilities are included — among the more affordable 3-bedroom price points in the city. For comparison, Zumper's rent report dated July 4, 2026 puts Cleveland's overall citywide 3-bedroom median noticeably higher, at **$1,350**, and RentCafe's July 2, 2026 report on professionally managed apartments puts the 3-bedroom average far higher still, at **$2,716**, reflecting newer, larger buildings rather than the older individual houses typical of Slavic Village.
Across Rent Finder Cleveland's broader portfolio, 3-bedroom homes typically run from about **$1,100 to $1,500** a month, so Slavic Village prices toward the lower end of what we manage citywide.

sections.h2: What Slavic Village's 3-bedroom rental homes are like
body: Most of the neighborhood's rental housing stock dates to the early 1900s, a mix of single-family homes, duplexes, and small multi-family buildings with front porches, full basements, and modest yards. Three-bedroom units in this stock generally come with the basement and yard, though exact features vary listing to listing — always confirm details for a specific address before applying. For a wider view of what's available across the city at this size, see our [Cleveland houses for rent guide](/houses-for-rent-cleveland-oh/).

Slavic Village is served by several RTA bus routes connecting to Downtown, and the neighborhood sits close to I-77 and I-490 for drivers. The Morgana Run Trail offers a paved path for walking and biking through the neighborhood, and the commercial strips along Broadway Avenue and Fleet Avenue cover everyday shopping without a long drive.

items: **Transit:** Multiple RTA bus lines to Downtown; near I-77 and I-490
**Everyday needs:** Shopping along Broadway and Fleet Avenues

sections.h2: Section 8 and 3-bedroom vouchers in Slavic Village
body: Households that need a 3-bedroom home to meet CMHA's voucher size standard can apply for a Housing Choice Voucher year-round through the [Cuyahoga Metropolitan Housing Authority's online portal](https://www.cmha.net/housing/applicants/housing_choice_vouchers.php). CMHA's published income limit for a 4-person household, effective April 3, 2025, is **$49,700**, and selection then runs through periodic mini-lotteries rather than a simple waiting line.

Every 3-bedroom home Rent Finder Cleveland manages in Slavic Village accepts Section 8 vouchers and is kept HUD-inspection-ready, so voucher holders can tour and apply with confidence. Read our [Cleveland Section 8 guide](/section-8-housing-cleveland-oh/) for how the local process, waitlist, and inspections work, or [book a showing](/p/book-showing) to see current 3-bedroom availability.
